name: Jimbo Calder
title: Senior Platform Engineer and Technical Mentor
summary: Platform engineer with 12 years of experience building internal developer tooling, cloud automation, and resilient delivery pipelines for product teams in fintech, health tech, and public-sector environments. Known for making complicated systems operable, writing clear technical documentation, and mentoring engineers across backend, infrastructure, and release workflows.

daily_practice: Uses code assistants to draft infrastructure changes, then reviews diffs and failure modes before merge.
Builds retrieval-backed internal support bots over runbooks and incident records.
Automates repetitive triage summaries for on-call handoff notes and deployment reviews.
teaching: Teaches prompt hygiene, source validation, and safe use of AI output in engineering teams.
Runs workshops on using AI to accelerate debugging without skipping root-cause analysis.
assessment: Designs team guidelines for acceptable AI use in take-home assessments and documentation tasks.

experience.title: Senior Platform Engineer
bullets: Led migration from hand-managed cloud resources to Terraform modules used by six delivery teams.
Cut failed deployment recovery time by introducing reusable rollout and rollback workflows.
Built internal documentation and office-hour processes that reduced platform support interruptions during releases.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Implemented cluster observability dashboards and alert tuning for patient-facing services.
Standardized service templates so new teams could ship production-ready APIs with fewer manual steps.
Partnered with developers to convert brittle shell automation into tested Go utilities.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Delivered workflow tools for records management and service intake across municipal departments.
Introduced pull-request templates and release notes conventions that improved auditability.
Mentored junior developers on debugging, testing strategy, and maintainable API design.

projects.title: Runbook Navigator
projects.description: Prototype assistant that indexes platform runbooks and links answers back to source documentation for support staff.

projects.title: Release Scorecard
projects.description: Internal dashboard that summarizes change risk, test coverage signals, and rollback readiness before production deployments.

education.thesis: Operational Patterns for Small-Team Cloud Platforms

volunteer.title: Mentor
volunteer.description: Mentors career changers on cloud fundamentals, portfolio projects, and technical interview preparation.

publications.title: Reducing Deployment Anxiety with Better Operational Feedback
